Projects

Things I've built.

Not mockups. Not concepts. Real products running on real infrastructure, serving real users.

LiveAI Product

PrecisionFlow.io

An autonomous AI agent that generates daily crypto content for Binance Square — analyzing coins, tracking market sentiment, and publishing posts without human input. Built with Python and custom LLM pipelines.

PythonAI AgentsLLM APIsCrypto APIsAutomation
LiveCompany

PrecisionTechInsights

A full-stack tech company offering AI development, cybersecurity, Web3, and web services. Founded and operated solo — managing client relationships, project delivery, and product development simultaneously.

BusinessAICybersecurityWeb3Web Dev
LiveInfrastructure

harishere Hosting Platform

White-label reseller hosting infrastructure running on enterprise servers with custom nameservers (ns1/ns2/ns3.harishere.com), SSL management, DirectAdmin, and full client account isolation.

DirectAdminDNSSSLApacheLinux
LivePersonal Brand

harishere.com

This very site — built with Next.js, hosted on my own infrastructure, featuring an AI assistant powered by Claude. Demonstrates my full-stack capabilities across design, development, and deployment.

Next.jsReactCSSClaude APISelf-hosted
OngoingCybersecurity

Security Audits

Web application security assessments for clients using Kali Linux, Burp Suite, and custom tooling. Reports include vulnerability findings, severity ratings, and actionable remediation steps.

Kali LinuxBurp SuiteOWASPPen TestingReporting
RunningLinkedIn

AI Content System

An AI-powered content pipeline that generates consistent, on-brand LinkedIn posts in my voice — helping maintain a 5K+ follower community in AI, cybersecurity, and Web3 without spending hours writing.
